modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Duo after replacing iPhone.

full_description_text: 
I recently replaced my iPhone and now I can't access Duo. This is preventing me from reading my email and accessing the online bookstore. It's quite frustrating since I need these services for my work. I would appreciate assistance in reactivating Duo on my new device.
short_description: Unable to access Duo after replacing iPhone.
description: I recently replaced my iPhone and now I can't access Duo. This is preventing me from reading my email and accessing the online bookstore. It's quite frustrating since I need these services for my work. I would appreciate assistance in reactivating Duo on my new device.
